title: VRRW Overworld
body:
Note: with NEO Forge Update the Mod ist more usable and more polished. More parts at Neoforge
![VRRW](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47fea6b3aa11ef89835e1cd96be8e7bb8be975a5_0.webp)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/s4_4omLjV7o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
## **To download free the texturepack it is now possible to complete some tasks and get it for free at -> Short time , the GOLD version** [ https://www.vrrw.online/challenges](https://www.vrrw.online/challenges)

### [DIscord](https://discord.com/invite/GRDv2vhvFh)

**Minimal GPU gtx 1060
Best value rtx 2050 and higher
**
# **VERY IMPOTANT -> set at embeddium options -> vertex compress OFF, this destroy shapes of trees, they will broke and stretch at any direction if you dont set this to off, Iris will break trees too. This is the reason why this version comes now with own shading system, you can play this version only with monocel and iris but needs rtx 4090 and higher**

To improve your experience play this mod With the QDAA mod, it sharpens the experience
. less blurry

Press M to activate Surfacenet realistic terrain

This mod changes the foliage, trees, grass, flowers bushes and rocks generation. To a ultra HD graphic expercience designed for newer graphic card likes RTX series. This is a Mod that gives you round plants or unusual model shapes and a vanilla texture feeling at first. 

The Mod is Designed to Play with No cubes. Get the max realism at Minecraft. Soon i create a new modpack with the VRRW functions, shader and some performance ooptemizing mods. And VRRW at hole change your dreams how to play minecraft soon, realistic citizien do tasks, need food and drink water.


VRRW changes the overworld generation.


Please Help the Project to get more range, for faster Updates ;).

Write a comment.at YouTube, and Join the Channels ;)


This video shows some more VRRW Mods but the foliage mod is into it :) enjoy and imagine what is coming soon :), 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yFtQDGOA128" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>





Get all textures at VRRW.online [https://www.vrrw.online/portfolio](https://www.vrrw.online/portfolio)

you can support the project there and get additional texture packs for my work. 128 x 128 / 256 x 256 / 512 x 512

 



Harvest wood from trees.
get dye from new flowers
Dripstone drop dripstone blocks
bees new generation system - flowers comes soon
Grass generates compatible with no cubes
Cactus and nettles gives damage
Mushroom fields has new style
 

BOOST YOUR FPS and get more functions with the VRRW modpack, playable with and without VR Headset.
good shader -> make up ultra fast.

You can join www.vrrw.online and promote the project actually you can get experimental textures for The Gold membership now, i add soon alll other memberships texture packs. - you can support the project there for faster development :).

 



 You need a Server for the Mod ? Try kinetic Hosting and get Discount with the Code VRRW. 

 



Discord for Issues and more (Server discriptions, mod guide, server host wiki),

 

 

SOON! new update. new trees :) 

 

 

 

 

Pictures are with complementary shader.
